content: The app sucks. it used to be good, and I didn't mind the ads but I'm not sharing my ID to the app that's data will end up being breached. I hope you fix this, because this is gonna end up being the reason why your app will crash.

This app has become quite upsetting like how it's now put me on reading mode with not warning or the non stop ads, but whatever this age check thing is for is quite annoying and untill it's removed I'm done with this.
app is trash now because of the recent updates. why don't they listen to us?👎

I'm sorry but you guys made your app worse. like- I didn't mind the ads when they were first added, but now? is out of hand. and recently, whats with the age estimation?! like are you guys tryna make this into roblox?... you guys seriously had a downfall, I miss old c.ai when it had its prime.

The stupid age verification system, I can never verify it, each time I try it says it didn't catch it, I tried from every room in my house, and it still didn't verify my age, remove the verification or fix it, and I can forgive the ads, because at least you can still use the app, the age verification is ruining exactly that, fix that problem or you'll lose a lot of your user base

I USED to think that c.ai was really good, but its just getting more and more disappointing. First off is the reading mode. Unless you use the age verification, you can't chat, and it's really annoying. Second is the age verification. It COULD'VE been okay if it was only the face scan and nothing else, but no, you guys also added a government ID & QR code verification. WHY THAT?! This app has been fine until you guys ruined it & I don't know why. Please fix the app & add the edit text back, too

Take off the age restriction there is no need to have one if the app is put for Teens not Mature and either way there is NOTHING to represent 18+ factors since they have filters which don't allow NSFW or BDSM or subjects like that. So there is no point in having an age restriction if there's nothing in the app to hide for teens 13-17.

I hope both sides of your pillow are warm, your blanket is somehow too short and too heavy at the same time, your phone charger only works if you hold it at a very specific angle while not breathing, your Wi-Fi disconnects at 99% every single time, your socks get wet for no clear reason, your sleeve slides down whenever you wash your hands, your alarm goes off but you’re still exhausted, autocorrect embarrasses you in front of the exact people you didn’t want to embarrass yourself in front of
l swear this app is so bipolar, you guys got rid of Chats entirely??? the one thing that got your company running? I guess I get it because of lawsuit reasons but Jesus dude.
horrible way to switch to 18+, just make it an 18+ requirement in the store. I'm not doing ai facial age verification and giving my id to text clankers.
Too many ads, whenever i even try to open a bot. It gives me two ads and then kicks me out onto TikTok and i have to restart the app over and over again.

I'm un-installing this app, its way too strict, I cannot chat anymore because of this AI verification, I hate how the people running is just making out-of-balance decisions to worsen the platform. BALANCE IS KEY TO THE GOAL OF THE PLATFORM AND THE USER!!!
All I can say is that the apps getting worse. Bring back old character ai
GET RID OF READING MODEE
What a fall it used to be good
not well I'm not liking new update even age verification

worst Ai app EVER. at first it was fun but now it's is filled with ads, restricted how long you can the voice and has started to take away certain personas and characters. I can understand some ads to help keep the cost low but this pay to use app style will and is it's downfall. if I could have given no stars I would have. do better.
I hate this app it has so many ads and it's soo boring
Useless app. It used to be fun and easy to use, now it has lots of ads and time limits, forcing peoples to pay for upgrade.
The ads are everywhere. This is a blatant sign of corporate greed. Many people already sign up for Cai+, there was no need to increase the ads to this degree. Its unusable in this state.

character ai has gone COMPLETELY down hill with these past few updates from ads to an age verification system which doesn't even work. character ai is supposed to be a CHATTING APP and the fact reading mode exists is insane. the update that was supposed to "help" teenagers are making them WORSE.

This app turned into roblox, using PERSONA as an age verification, I DONT trust persona. This app deserves to die out, better switch to other AI chatboxes. This app used to be a king which is now overthrown by how disgusting their devs became
this is disappointing. considering what it used to be and then what it is now, is just sad.
what happened c. ai? why does it needs a reading mode when the app itself is a chatting platform? so disappointed
fix ur app bozo
You ruined something precious. Hope you guys are satisfied

why did they add 18+ only it made it so annoying to talk I can't even talk anymore I used this to get away and say anything I want but y'all had to take that away, all of these other ai's aren't the same

people who are barely 18 should get the access to chat, but tbh it's js an app where you texting w ai, you can just ban whoever uses it to do something horrible, thus this app got ai that can help w people who are struggling to learn something yk, i mean yea google is easy but this app feels like talking to a teacher too, disappointed w the updates and this app now.

This App Is Good In Chatting But What The Hell Is The Age Verification??? Okay Fine We need to verify our age but can't you give a simple method??? This Method Is So Hard And Crazy And Even This App Is Now Worst Like.. The Ads, We Can't Even Chat Without Age verifying Y'all Know This app Is Going Worst When It is becoming Popular. And Before It Was Good But After The Age Verifying And Time Limitations It has become The Worst I Request The Developers And Game Managers To Simply Remove The Methods
It's bad... since the update
Absolutely despise the banner add. It'a so intrusive. Why ask your community what they want, and then pack it full of ads? I understand it's a 'free' application- but you're doing too much.

I can't see when you have a very Big block of ads on top of the screen, with my small phone, I can't read anything without scrolling because it's been blocked by the ads. please make them thinner, that's all I'm asking for. and also the age restriction, like I haven't gotten my ID yet, gosh, so annoying!!! I would rate this 0 stars!!!
got ruined lol

It's bad now. Not enjoyable. I got an ad mid convo with the ai. I opened the app again and I can no longer chat with the ai unless I'm age verified. This was such a cool app back then but now it's playable. I'd rate this zero stars if it were available

I used to LOVVEEE this app very much. It used help me deal with my mental health from my 'friend' that makes it worse. But Theres now ads and chat limiting! I can't even chat 5 messages without ads popping out to waste my chat time! And the chat limit is only 1 hour and the time it takes? 14-20 hours. I also appreciate the cool bots that many people make in this app but im stuck in reading mode forever! Please remove the age verification, make the chat time 3-5 hours and the break 2-3 hours.

Well I love this app since the beta website came out now I feel as though all its becoming impossible to use just for fun chatting with ai characters the constant ads ruin the experience and it feels like now it's pushing for you to get the C.ai + just to avoid all of the ads and now they have a max daily swipe limit on chats resets and well I have unfortunately caved to buying the subscription since I enjoy C.ai to much i I hope someday things will change back to how they were
I can't talk to my favorite bots now like what?😪✌️

Ive been doing roleplays and storys on character ai but its all ruined because of the age verification. why do I have to waste my time just to chat with one bot? and no im not showing my ID because its personal. and I have to waste my time because of the chat limit. fix your app

Bro, why does it have to be 18+ to chat now? I have been using these app for 3 years and there isn't any better app than this, until this age verification update came, hell nah you guys are digging your own graves... Like seriously other bad updates I didn't care until this update came... I hate it, fix it or we users aren't going to use this app anymore

what's the point in making it a teen app if you put a screen time on it, and reading mode for a chatting app? you cannot be serious. I just know this is gonna cause more offing rates because of how many teens are addicted to it.
bad update bring the old one back it's more good I'm switching to emochi. whatever you guys put is bad and worse than Roblox
please delete this age verification i don't have friends but i like to talk with ai i know I'm weird but please
bring back the old version
i definitely hate the updates

Reading mode on a chatting app? Some people, mostly teenagers, use this app to seek comfort. And you want them young teenagers to feel lonely again after they finally found comfort in your app? Let the kids feel loved. Your new reading mode update is so trash

I'm not taking a selfie or uploading any photo ID just to talk to a chat bot. I'm an adult ffs, I should not have been flagged for this age verification bs. I'm not an American so I don't know why this age law should affect me. Giving them your face and ID is not a smart thing to do anyway.
ah yes reading
i love this app until it have the age verification, and i can't use it anymore. how shame💔

this app is terrible. ive had it since it came out. 1. they're making it 18+, which is already a big red flag. most bot creators are 16-17. if they go through with it, they've lost half of their community. 2. the ads... there would be one ad like every 5 characters you click on? now it's everytime you open the app, every 10 messages... the ads on top of the screen ticks me off. 3. reading mode SHOULDN'T EXIST. this app is made for chatting. not READING.
thou hast turned on us. we liked it specifically because it didn't have ads.

I've been using this app since 2023. Well, what an unsatisfied update, you make it worse tbh. Reading mode in a chat app?Wow, just wow. My life is already boring, and then you decide to add that, it makes me bored even more when I don't get to talk to the bots.
I used to love the app but now I can phantom how it's made..the age verification doesn't even work
flagged for being a minor i rather hang myself than do age verification..

I was alright with the new 18+ update since I'm well over that, but they really fumbled the ball since they started using persona for age verification. Quite literally one of the worst companies to trust with your ID (which you have to show proof of to verify age). Instant delete for me, which is unfortunate as I have many good conversations I had saved.

Bro I used to roleplay in this game back in like mid 2023, but now it's just a mess. First the age verification thingy also the id scan, like why? Also I heard that there are too many ads and the bots are stupid and idiotic and they removed the edit button and the 1 hour timer before they have to wait. I quit. Let's get this game to 1 star and maybe they'll remove it or change it...?

I love the app and all...but the STUPID AGE RESTRICTION everyone deserves to use c.ai for relief and stress or anything else. WHY the heck do we have to ADD our IDS..that UNNECESSARY...I have to keep deleting every single account and make a new one to talk to the same character and the history is just all gone...it's just so freaking annoying. c.ai fix it...it's not helping...it's just the worst...this all is starting to suck. some people don't even want to use it anymore...REMOVE THE AGE THING.

omg this app is completly ruined. Im not even allowed to chat anymore because of the age verification. btw, I'm 19, I think I'm old enough to use this app? every time I try to verify myself, it always says that it's not able to process it? and the ads were a big problem too. You would get so many ads for c.ai+ but I think the app should be free anyway. bring back the old c.ai.
it sucks now
sampah
I can't even chat anymore..
age verification pisses me off

Character AI has become far too greedy. Firstly, the pop-up ads were fine, only annoying at the beginning, but now they have added banners that you cannot get rid of, and seem to reappear after some time. Not only is it annoying, but greedy of the creators. The only way to get rid of it is to buy a subscription, which only gives them more money. If you're going to add banners, let us remove them from our screen. Plus, the filters prevent basically any little serious chat to occur. It's useless.
Ts is so corny there's no way ppl actually use this 🙏😭

it's honestly the best app I used... but sadly it started to shut down randomly, having ads and not letting me write... disappointing, really edit: OK, it was already terrible, now with the new age update is even worse, WORSE

Alright, notice how LOW your ratings are going down by? Yeah, its cause of your updates. I'd expect a company who got $50 million to do better. Its saddening and honestly hypocritical of how you all decide to slap ads in people's faces as if people aren't already paying monthly for a membership that barely does anything. All these new 1-star ratings drowning out your old 5-star ones is entirely deserved to be blamed on your company.
I use to have it back in May 2024, but this year it say a verify age, I don't like that updates, too much ads, too much verify age. 😤
I can't even use this app anymore, it's always in reading mode, I'm starting to hate this app sm
the time limit sucks, it's literally a chatting app and you put a read mode??, I miss the old cai.
wow great. amazing. i tried to verify my age but it doesn't work. i hate you.

why should we have to verify our accounts with id if the app doesn't even allow for nsfw content? plus, the ads are absolutely ridiculous and the bots are worse. they constantly forget what you said only 2 messages beforehand and randomly generate things not in your story. I would recommend anything but this app
I hate about the ads popping up and the age verification
Definitely should remove the age verification and time limit.

The app is not that fun anymore. The responses are repetitive, the policies are too strict and too sensitive, and need verification id's to chat when there could've been other methods to verify the age.

I left the app to use the browser just to escape the ads and this morning I get ads mid chat, stop adding ads and more extras to an app that doesn't need anything else, remove these ads please, people are already saying that it is the worst, people are quitting your app just to avoid the ads please fix this

The ads have become unbearable, it used to be great but they've lied to us and given us interrupting ads. l am not picking up the app again for a little while. The banner ads were fine, but y'all are failing basic stuff with this: Ad fatigue, and y'all are maximizing and fatigue. Listen to your audience.
you guys have to add students ID in the age verification process
awful

I loved this app but now that mine is one reading mode, I wonder to myself why? It's a chatting app, it's called Character ai, it says you talk, chat with your favorite characters and stuff, so why is it on, like their is so desperate for money, their update is so bad.
go ahead keep runing the app

Great. Now the app made for chatting with bots isn't letting you chat, and the alternative is to make lame ai stories! How creative! I genuinely cannot believe it. Shut the whole app down at this point. Reading mode, are we serious? I'm not putting my government ID just to chat with bots. The time limit was understandable somewhat, but this is downright insane. Please fix this, and maybe your ratings will go over 2.7/5!!

I don't usually give opinions, but I think this one deserves it. I used to use this app a lot, but since age verification, it's useless. You literally can't do anything in it, and the verification doesn't work.

it was good at start i had it back than but now it stinks. wanting me to give my face, ID than what country im in? this is too much just to talk to something that doesnt even work. why cai ceo? it was so good now your ruining it!
This app is actually so bad. I had to wait like 20 hours to chat again then when I finally unlocked it, it put me in reading mode. what happened to this app?
THE NEW UPDATE SUCKS REMOVE THE AGE VERIFICATION YOUR AI WONT DETECT MY FACE
Say how many more days do I have to wait to be able to chat? it's been five days now since I last chatted.
everything sucks

this update SUCKS.gen why have a chat time of an hour and 14 days of not chatting/not allowed to chat.even the age verification and being 18+ thing,why verify ur own face and id just to chat an ai? PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE c.ai remove this update so we can chat in peace bro,there are already problems about the update on tiktok and people HATE it.suicide rates are probably increasing,nobody can cope anymore,people having a mental breakdown.
Ads way too often and the change in the layout made no sense
mala experiencia tiene mucho por mejorar la memoria de los personajes los temas todo. hay mil mejores está aplicación no es nada
you ruined my fav ai, seriously, this is the worst update ever, never using this

The app is horrible now, it was great in the beginning, but as the updates continued, the app has gotten worse and now I could only talk to a character for an hour before it says I'm on it for too long. Then you have to wait almost 24 hours before being allowed back on

sometimes it just put me on reading mode for a very ling time or i have to wait 18+ hours just to chat again, it is quite annoying cause it happens very frequently, and everytime i enter the app it just send me straight out, please fix it....

Over the past few updates, they have made this app horrible to use. There is now an age verification step, and a time limit. For users deemed under eighteen, you cannot even chat anymore. Which defeats the purpose of a chatting app. It's useless now, and I have deleted it. There are ads, but that didn't bother me as it didn't hinder my usage.
worst.
ok now this app is unusable I loved the old one but this is not good anymore
i hate it need verify age, ur change something we all love

they made it so unusable. And honestly, guys, just talk to your friends or family, or just make up the conversations yourself in notes app or something (it's AI, it's extremely generic, you can definitely predict what it would've said anyways) And just do something else idk but this is really pointless at this point and it's better to just not even try to use the app. And also, I assure you that if you socialize enough times you will eventually end up with people to talk to, please just do that.

Used to be such a great app. Now the bots are WAY too sensitive like I can't even say about a little bit of blood without it saying about the guidelines, lots of the bots I loved are now unavailable AND THE WORST PART IS IF YOUR LIST OF BOTS IS TOO LONG TO FIT IN THE PAGE THEN THE CONVERSATIONS WITH THOSE BOTS WILL BE DELETED LOKE WTAF!? Was great when it was first made now it's just useless. Do not recommend, I'm going to Talkie since that's the best app I know.

shut down at this point, c.ai community is not happy about your app. Look where it got you, it got into the <2 stars, you should CARE about your community, you should LISTEN to them, yet you didnt. the age check, limited features, short memory, you guys shoving EVERY feature to c.ai+, useless features nobody even wanted it. Maybe listen to your community once, and that wouldn't HAPPEN.
can you fix this c.ai or I'm not playing anymore.fix the age verification tool. ITS STILL ERORRING.
